author: MacHatter1
title: review import split-brain parser: CLI and tested parser disagree on findings alias
notes: Verified: helpers._parse_and_validate_import (used by CLI via cmd.py) does not call normalize_legacy_findings_alias, so {"findings": []} is rejected. parse._parse_and_validate_import (used by tests) does normalize findings->issues. Behavioral divergence is real and demonstrated. Caveat: findings is a legacy alias with limited practical scope, and S166 already identified related duplication in the same parse.py/helpers.py files.
